creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
There's 8 log files of almost 500k each for a total of 3.6MB uncompressed. Would attaching 8 individual logs be preferred over one tar-zip?

I was asked for log files for another patch and figured sending logs to show successful builds can help by reducing the need for commiters to re-build again. Just guessing this is becoming a standard submission step for port updates.
